attrDocs.alt: object to fetch if src not found
attrDocs.onerror: ignores failed fetches and continues serving the page
attrDocs.maxwait: time-out period for EdgeSuite to wait for fetch

esi:vars.summary: Define and evaluate variables within a fragment

attrDocs.alt: Specify alternative object if src object cannot be fetched

esi:assign.summary: Assigns a value to a user-defined variable

esi:eval.summary: Evaluates another ESI page inline at processing time

attrDocs.src: URL of the ESI page to evaluate

esi:when.summary: Conditional content based on Boolean expression

esi:otherwise.summary: Evaluates content if all when conditions are false

esi:try.summary: Error handling container, wraps esi:attempt and esi:except

esi:attempt.summary: Primary branch within esi:try, content to attempt first

esi:except.summary: Execute alternative content if ESI attempt fails

esi:text.summary: Inserts flat text without ESI processing

esi:remove.summary: Removes content block at ESI processing time

esi:inline.summary: Defines an inline ESI fragment that can be included by name

attrDocs.name: Name of the inline fragment
attrDocs.fetchable: Whether the fragment can be fetched independently
